title: Mismatch in Webhook URL configuration
symptom: The webhook URL is not responding correctly, leading to a 404 error or indefinite waiting. The user is unable to trigger the webhook as expected.
not_this_if: N8N_HOST is set to localhost or 127.0.0.1
root_cause: Setting N8N_HOST to 0.0.0.0 means the application listens on all interfaces, but the webhook URL must match the address used to access n8n. If they don't match, requests may not be routed correctly.
fix_steps: Change the N8N_HOST environment variable from 0.0.0.0 to localhost
Ensure the WEBHOOK_URL matches the new host setting
Restart the n8n instance and test the webhook again
agent_instruction: Change N8N_HOST to localhost and ensure the webhook URL is correctly set.
